justification: The diff successfully migrates to Java 21, Jakarta EE, and modern Spring/Hibernate versions, replacing `@Autowired` with constructor injection, `@RequestMapping` with `@GetMapping`/`@PostMapping`, and `String.format` with `String.formatted()`. It also uses pattern matching for `instanceof` (line 31 in SecurityServiceImpl.java). However, it misses updating `spring-data-jpa.version` (still 1.10.6.RELEASE, incompatible with Spring 6/Hibernate 6) and `hibernate-validator.version` (still 5.2.1.Final), which would cause build/runtime failures. The `pom.xml` also has indentation issues in the new dependency blocks.
